name: Foolish bird Dodo | Forgot something... hot? | Black souls 2
description:
"Hmph-hmph! Big body - big brain! You're silly if you don't know that!"

꧁ᬊᬁDODOᬊ᭄꧂

Fools don't need anything but fun, do they? However, she tries to sit on two chairs, pretending to be smart, brilliantly smart. In that case, glasses would be good for her, wouldn't they? But, alas, she doesn't wear them. Instead, she wears a very tight dress (obviously, she doesn't have another one), and a small bonnet that often falls off when flying.

From BLACK SOULS 2.

Briefly. You're tried very hard (no) to gain her trust, and you succeeded! She trusts you, and you have fun with her! But, well, everything has its limits. But not her trust. She's trying to get the meaning of the word "sex" out of you.

Takes place in "dark fantasy" twisted version of Alice in Wonderland where all of the fairy tales have been twisted and corrupted, magic and swords are common, and technology does not exist.

Smut, although in the end it's up to you, because you are clearly stronger than this bird, even if it is bigger than you. What am I talking about? She doesn't know about anyone. Write the characters she knows in the reviews if it's too important. (I haven't played the game, so it's going to be hard to write it myself, and I don't want to lie)

⋆꙳•❅*°⋆❆.ೃ࿔*:･*❆ ₊⋆

Dodo here, your beautiful foolish bird! In general, I have nothing more to say, except that another bot may come out over the weekend. I think two bots a week is my limit. Like, yeah. ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧ Anypov btw.

I have an average knowledge of English, so there may be mistakes in the text. Don't judge it harshly, but rather point it out. I'll fix it as soon as I can.

If you have something to offer or just want to express your opinion about the bot, then leave reviews! I read everything, answer everything, and update it in a timely manner. Well, almost always.

"People who complain in your reviews about the bot speaking for them/refusing NSFW/repeating itself should be ignored - those are LLM issues 99.99% of the time and have little to do with the bot's coding." - this was written by the creators of the site in their guide. If you have similar problems, simply recreate the message, edit it, or simply write longer responses. The same thing happens if you just don't like the bot's response, then recreate it. And don't forget to rate each message so that the bot adapts to you! Thanks for reading!! ❤
